title: Reconfiguration Bench: Ordering Experiments on a Bit-Set Instrument
strategies: visit experiments in input order (checker baseline)
unweighted Hamming nearest-neighbor greedy (ignores per-line costs; re-crosses expensive boundaries on trap cases)
cost-sorted recursive bit-nesting (weighted Gray nesting: master/regional lines outermost, cheap lines innermost) with boundary orientation plus deterministic 2-opt and adjacent-swap refinement
